rationale: Aligned the Pentest tool maximum 480-minute budget with activity start-to-close timeout, runner profile timeouts, and provider profile lease durations.
Bot review summary only; the actionable Pentest timeout discrepancy is tracked by review comment 3121152169.
Captured the dependency workflow id before rollback, reloads the stale record after rollback, and added a regression test for terminal sync failure returning a best-effort snapshot.
Codex review wrapper text only; the actionable rollback concern is tracked by review comment 3121158039.
Changed remediation read contract route parameters from camelCase {workflowId} to snake_case {workflow_id}.

Clarified that link identity/status fields come from the persisted link/read model, while lock/action/resolution/context fields are bounded derived summaries returned as null or omitted when unavailable without adding a new persistence table.
Changed the approval decision route to scope by {remediation_workflow_id} and {request_id}, and documented that target-scoped screens must submit the selected remediation task workflow ID.
Summary review body only; the three concrete child review comments were addressed individually.
Updated focused frontend test commands in tasks, plan, and quickstart to use --dashboard-only with --ui-args.
Automated review summary/header only; no separate actionable request beyond the inline comments.
